title: ERCOT DAM Generation Resource AS Offers 60 Day JSON API
description:
Generation offers for ancillary services in ERCOT with a 60-day delay.

This dataset contains the offers to provide ancillary servies by generation resources in ERCOT. Each row contains bids across all products for a particular resource at a particular time. Services offered include ERCOT Contingency Reserve Service (ECRS), Non-Spinning Responsive Reserves (NSPIN), Regulation Down (REGDN), Regulation Up (REGUP), and Responsive Reserves (RRS).
